Tanish Karmakar

I turn raw data into decisions. Data analyst with real internship experience, a sharp eye for patterns, and a genuine fluency in AI tools that most analysts are still figuring out.

↓ scroll
Who I Am

Not just another data student.

I'm a final-year Computer Engineering student at Silver Oak University with a CGPA of 8.6+, and I've been working with data in real environments — not just theory. I completed two internships before most of my peers finished their second semester of stats.

What makes me different is that I treat AI as infrastructure, not a novelty. I use LLMs, prompting frameworks, and AI-assisted workflows the way good analysts used Excel pivots in 2005 — as a force multiplier that lets me move faster and think cleaner.

I'm the kind of person who builds a Power BI dashboard on F1 racing data for fun and deploys an IoT system for mushroom farming as a college project. That tells you something.

Differentiator

AI-Native Analyst

Most analysts know how to use data tools. I also know how to use AI to work 3x faster — from structuring analysis questions with LLMs, to automating report drafts, to using Cursor for cleaner Python workflows. I'm Udemy-certified in Prompt Engineering and actively use 8+ AI platforms in my day-to-day work.

Where I've Worked

Internship Experience

Data Science Intern
2024 · 1 Month
Prodify Infotech · Mumbai, India
  • Worked on structured datasets through full pipeline: ingestion, cleaning, transformation, and EDA using Python (Pandas, NumPy)
  • Assisted in building a basic ML prediction pipeline — exposure to real production-style data science workflows
  • Translated analysis outputs into readable summaries for internal stakeholders
  • Received a formal Letter of Recommendation from the Software Engineering Manager, Deven Chopra
Data Analytics Intern
2024 · 1 Month
TechnoHacks EduTech · Remote
  • Analysed business datasets to surface trends, outliers, and performance patterns
  • Built visualizations with Matplotlib and Seaborn to communicate findings to non-technical teams
  • Produced structured EDA reports covering data quality, distribution analysis, and correlation mapping
  • Leveraged AI tools to accelerate insight documentation, reducing reporting time significantly
Things I've Built

Project Work

🏎️ F1 Driver Performance Analysis
Built a full Power BI dashboard analysing Formula 1 race data — covering total points by driver, average position gain, finishing position trends, and historical performance from 1950s to 2020s.
PythonPower BIPandasEDAData Viz
GitHub LinkedIn Post
🎬 Netflix Data Analysis
Analysed Netflix's content library — cleaned and processed the dataset, then visualised content rating distributions, top content-producing countries, and genre breakdowns using Python.
PythonMatplotlibSeabornNumPyEDA
GitHub LinkedIn Post
🍄
🌱 IoT Smart Mushroom Cultivation System
Designed and deployed an IoT system that monitors temperature and humidity in real time to optimise agricultural growing conditions. Built the full data pipeline from sensor to dashboard.
IoTPythonSensor DataData Pipeline
GitHub
